description_long: This is a modern apartment building with a red brick exterior and a flat white roof. The structure features three stories, with a variety of window sizes and arrangements, including large floor-to-ceiling windows on one side and smaller, regularly spaced windows on others. The building has a recessed main entrance, visible on the front facade, and a small green wall detail on one side. The upper floor includes a partially open terrace or balcony area, and the overall form is composed of interlocking rectangular volumes. The design is clean and geometric, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, urban living spaces.
description: A three-story red brick apartment building with large windows, a flat roof, and a modern, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, and a small green wall detail on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly solid brick wall, a large window at the lower right, and a glimpse of the upper terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring extensive floor-to-ceiling windows on the ground floor and a row of windows on the upper floors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of window sizes and a clear view of the upper terrace and rear door.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a mostly regular, grid-like pattern with some variation in size and grouping, especially on the rear facade where larger windows are grouped together. The arrangement is generally symmetrical on the front and more varied on the sides and back.
